title: Temporium Reforged
description: A mod designed to make the experience of a Temporium player better!
body:
Temporium Reforged is a mod for BCmpact Temporium on DiamondFire. It adds:
- A custom health & energy bar
- Ability to move action bar elements
- Ability bar display
- A tick or cross showing whether you are high level enough or not to use a weapon

To open config, either use **/reforged config** in-game or use ModMenu to open the config.
